meta.title: 法律常识
meta.description: Upper-intermediate legal knowledge vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: liability, evidence, rights, and conditional/causal patterns.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 중급~중상급 법률 상식 어휘와 문형: 법적 책임, 증거, 권리, 조건·인과 구문.

questions.prompt: 「法律责任」是什么意思？(What does 法律责任 mean?)
「起诉」是什么意思？(What does 起诉 mean?)

explanation.en: 「合法权益」(héfǎ quányì) means "legitimate rights and interests".

questions.prompt: 「合法权益」是什么意思？(What does 合法权益 mean?)
choices: 合法权益(legitimate rights and interests)

questions.prompt: 「证据」是什么意思？(What does 证据 mean?)
「违约」是什么意思？(What does 违约 mean?)
如果公司泄露了客户信息，需要承担相应的___。(If a company leaks customer information, it needs to bear the corresponding legal liability.)
他决定___这家公司，要求赔偿损失。(He decided to sue this company, demanding compensation for losses.)
消费者的___应该受到法律保护。(Consumers' legitimate rights and interests should be protected by law.)
法庭要求原告提供充分的___来支持自己的主张。(The court requires the plaintiff to provide sufficient evidence to support their claim.)
这家公司因为___被合作方起诉，需要支付违约金。(This company was sued by its partner for breach of contract, needs to pay a penalty.)
尽管证据不足，法院___做出了初步裁决。(Although the evidence was insufficient, the court still made a preliminary ruling.)
无论涉及金额多少，法律面前人人___平等。(No matter how much money is involved, everyone is equal before the law.)
除非有确凿的证据，___法院不会轻易定罪。(Unless there is solid evidence, the court won't easily convict.)
这个案件之所以引起广泛关注，___是因为涉及公众利益。(This case attracted widespread attention precisely because it involves public interest.)

explanation.en: 「面前」(miànqián) here means "in the presence of".

questions.prompt: 这份合同是双方在律师___见证下签订的。(This contract was signed with a lawyer as witness for both parties.)
这个法律漏洞被___利用，导致了很多纠纷。(This legal loophole was exploited, leading to many disputes.)
这起案件___了很多社会矛盾，引发了广泛讨论。(This case exposed many social contradictions, sparking widespread discussion.)
法律的___在于维护社会公平正义。(The purpose of law lies in maintaining social fairness and justice.)
为了保护自己的___，他咨询了专业律师。(In order to protect his own rights, he consulted a professional lawyer.)
双方在签订合同前，都应该仔细阅读___条款。(Before signing the contract, both parties should carefully read the terms.)

explanation.en: 「相应的」(corresponding) must come right before the noun 法律责任: 相应的法律责任 (not 相应的承担法律责任 with wrong placement).
explanation.ko: 「相应的」는 명사 '法律责任' 바로 앞에 와야 하므로 '承担相应的法律责任'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 如果公司泄露了客户信息，需要相应的承担法律责任。(If a company leaks customer information, it needs to bear the corresponding legal liability.) — find the error
choices: 如果公司泄露了客户信息，需要承担相应的法律责任。
如果公司泄露了客户信息，需要相应的承担法律责任。
如果公司泄露了客户信息，相应的需要承担法律责任。
如果公司泄露了客户信息，需要承担法律相应的责任。

explanation.en: 「否则」must come at the start of the second clause, before 法院: 否则法院〜 (not 法院否则〜).
explanation.ko: 「否则」는 두 번째 절의 맨 앞, '法院' 앞에 와야 하므로 '否则法院〜'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 无论涉及金额多少，法律面前人人都平等。(No matter how much money is involved, everyone is equal before the law.) — this is correct, use another: 除非有确凿的证据，法院否则不会轻易定罪。(Unless there is solid evidence, the court won't easily convict.) — find the error
choices: 除非有确凿的证据，否则法院不会轻易定罪。
除非有确凿的证据，法院否则不会轻易定罪。
除非有确凿的证据，否则不会法院轻易定罪。
除非有确凿的证据，法院不会否则轻易定罪。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是: 是因为 (not 因为是).
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 하므로 '是因为'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 这个案件之所以引起广泛关注，因为是涉及公众利益。(This case attracted widespread attention precisely because it involves public interest.) — find the error
choices: 这个案件之所以引起广泛关注，是因为涉及公众利益。
这个案件之所以引起广泛关注，因为是涉及公众利益。
这个案件之所以引起广泛关注，是涉及因为公众利益。
这个案件之所以引起广泛关注，涉及是因为公众利益。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 如果公司泄露了客户信息，需要承担相应的法律责任 ("If a company leaks customer information, it needs to bear the corresponding legal liability").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '如果公司泄露了客户信息，需要承担相应的法律责任' (회사가 고객 정보를 유출하면 그에 상응하는 법적 책임을 져야 한다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 如果公司泄露了客户信息，__________法律责任。(If a company leaks customer information, it needs to bear the corresponding legal liability.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 除非有确凿的证据，否则法院不会轻易定罪 ("Unless there is solid evidence, the court won't easily convict").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '除非有确凿的证据，否则法院不会轻易定罪' (확실한 증거가 없는 한, 법원은 쉽게 유죄를 판결하지 않는다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 除非有确凿的证据，__________不会轻易定罪。(Unless there is solid evidence, the court won't easily convict.)
